name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust ingredients together and press into pie shell.
2. In a separate bowl, mix peanut butter, cream cheese, sugar, and butter until smooth.
3. Whip the heavy whipping cream with vanilla until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream mixture into the peanut butter mixture.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie crust and refrigerate for one hour or until semi-hard.
6. Heat the cream in a saucepan over low heat, then add chocolate. Remove from heat and stir until melted.
7. Cool the glaze slightly and spread over the cooled pie filling.
8. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
Note: This pie is rich and can be cut into 16 pieces. Great for a crowd.
